pcr: EPD Hub Core PCR v1.2 (2025-03-24); cPCR EN 16757
lca_tool: One Click LCA Concrete EPD Generator v3.2.1
scope: Cradle to gate with options, A4-A5, and modules C1-C4, D
notes: Compressive strength class 'S40' (28-day) — the 'S' prefix denotes AS 1379 special-class concrete per this corpus's convention (cf. S32MPa/S25-20-100 in IES docs), though this EPD's own text never uses the words 'special-class'; standard recorded as the base 'AS 1379-2007' citation from the bibliography (p7) and product description (p2, '...designed to comply with the requirements of AS1379').

location.sites reflects the single 'Place of production' address given for this product (Airlie Beach, p2). Marketing text on p3 separately lists five company-wide batch plants (Airlie Beach, Mackay, Marian, Rockhampton, Yeppoon) not tied specifically to this EPD's declared production site.

p12 GWP-GHG (A1-A3 = 284) prints identical to GWP-total (A1-A3 = 284) despite a small non-zero biogenic component (-0.0281 at A1-A3) — likely a rounding artifact at 3 significant figures, the same pattern flagged in IES-0029695. GWP-GHG is not used anywhere in this record (never placed in gwp_a1a3_alt).

EN 15804+A1/CML table (p11) A1-A3 total also rounds to 284, coincidentally identical to the +A2 figure; underlying per-module CML values differ slightly (A1 253 vs 254, A2 26.2 vs 26.3, A3 4.04 vs 4.07), consistent with them being separate methodologies.
